creator: arnaud.houdelette@tzim.net
text:
Hi. 

Just a quick note until I do some more tests : 

If xbmc-addon-pvr port builds ok, current built version (hts plugin at least) does not loads under kodi : 

ERROR: PVR - Add-on 'Tvheadend HTSP Client' is using an incompatible API version. XBMC minimum API version = '1.9.2', add-on API version '1.9.0'
